verse_text: But He gives more grace. Therefore He says: 'God resists the proud, But gives grace to the humble.'

pericope.title: Lack of Faith and Works: Quarrels in the Church

links.context: These parables are directed toward guests (vv. 7-11) and hosts (vv. 12-14). In imitation of Christ, perfect humility is expected of guests, and boundless charity is demanded of hosts (see [[JAS.4:6]]).
